# components/step_renderer


<!-- WARNING: THIS FILE WAS AUTOGENERATED! DO NOT EDIT! -->

## Step Renderer

Composes all panels into a single step view: - Two-column layout: file
browser (left) + selection queue (right) - Collapsible preview panel
below - Stats / verify panel below - SortableJS scripts at the bottom

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### render_source_select_step

``` python

def render_source_select_step(
    selected_files:List, # Ordered selection
    extraction_results:Dict, # video_path -> result
    verified:bool, # Whether selection is verified
    urls:SourceSelectUrls, # URL bundle
    render_browser_panel_fn:Callable, # Browser panel render function from init_browser_router
    selected_folders:Optional=None, # Folder paths for checkbox sync
)->functools.partial(<function ft_hx at 0x7fe0ca383ec0>, 'div'): # Complete step view

```

*Render the complete source selection step.*
